Update to clarify how the account is purchased: all signs indicate it 'woke up' in 2019; his Mercenary badge is from that year,
and his account has no history whatsoever--on ANY site, even ONCE--prior to then. You can also see that he has no achievements,
in any game, earned prior to 2019, but the Steam achievement system dates back to long before that. Also, his TF2 review indicates he had 2,800 hours by November 2019,
and 1,200 since, so it'd be more likely to see *more* activity on the account before 2019 (of which there is *zero*) on, e.g., SteamRep, than after, which is the case.
